headline: Western Digital AI Storage Push At Computex 2026 And Valuation Gap
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) used Computex 2026 to showcase new storage technologies designed specifically for AI workloads. The company highlighted High Bandwidth Drive Technology and Dual Pivot Drive Technology aimed at handling growing AI data throughput and access needs. Western Digital also introduced its Ultrastar Data 3000 JBOD platform and platform-level AI data lifecycle solutions focused on large scale AI and cloud environments. For investors following Western Digital, the...
